entity.summary: Hybrid perpetual-futures exchange combining off-chain order matching with on-chain settlement, self-custodial account controls, cross-chain deposits, liquidity-provider products, and professional trading interfaces.
entity.notes: Classified as hybrid because current first-party documentation describes off-chain order matching with on-chain settlement and self-custodial controls. HEI models Antarctic, Antarctic Exchange, AX, AMLP, AHLP, supported-chain deposit surfaces, and professional trading modes as one exchange entity.

evidence.title: Antarctic perpetual exchange documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Antarctic as a decentralized perpetual futures exchange with non-custodial settlement, transparent market operations, deep-liquidity design, and a CEX-style user experience.

evidence.title: Antarctic protocol trading metrics
evidence.notes: Independent metrics report current non-zero perpetual volume, fees, revenue, open interest, and liquidity-product TVL for Antarctic, corroborating active exchange operation.
